resultRaw.sql:
SELECT building || ' ' || room_number AS classroom_label, capacity AS capacity, id AS classroom_id, building AS building, room_number AS room_number
FROM public.classrooms
ORDER BY capacity DESC, id ASC
LIMIT 10

issues: All encoded fields (classroom_label, capacity, building, room_number, classroom_id) exist in metadata.columns — OK.
The Vega-Lite x sort uses an aggregation ("op":"sum") which is unnecessary because the SQL returns one row per classroom; this is a minor mismatch but not breaking.

The SQL orders ties by id (ORDER BY capacity DESC, id ASC) to be deterministic, but the chart's sort only orders by capacity and does not include the id tiebreaker — bars for equal capacities may appear in a different order than the SQL result.

ORDER BY capacity DESC, id ASC

The Vega-Lite x sort uses an aggregation ("op":"sum") which is unnecessary because the SQL returns one row per classroom; this is a minor mismatch but not breaking.
